MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case #289693 (Conservatorship of Sarina Djerassi).

Appearances: Amy Harrington for Linda Harrington.

Ms. Harrington stated that Linda Harrington (Conservator of Estate and Successor Trustee) was requesting a continuance to mid September for personal reasons. The matter was continued to September 23, 2008.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
